questionHtml: Analyse the differences in biodiversity seen in the three sites.
markschemeHtml:
a. number of individuals differs more than number of species between the zones 

b. zone E has lowest diversity / zone F has highest diversity 

c. zone B has higher diversity than zone E 

d. edge effect is evident

meta.title: Analyse the differences in biodiversity seen in the three sites.
breadcrumbLabels: Option C: Ecology and conservation (Core topics)
